creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to martin from comment #0)

Please: is there a comparable panic with graphics/drm-510-kmod on FreeBSD 13.1-RELEASE with all updates applied?

<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-kmod/>
<https://www.freshports.org/graphics/drm-510-kmod/>

<https://github.com/freebsd/drm-kmod/issues?q=is%3Aissue+is%3Aopen+sort%3Aupdated-desc+load> I'm aware of at least one load order issue, however it's not comparable to this 2017 report. 

(Tagged by me for review … if no feedback before the end of January 2023, we might reasonably close this report (overcome by events).)
